case_title: JANE MCFEELY et al VS. BRONSON MACOMBER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY EXCEPT PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MCFEELY WAS NOT PRESANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2014 - JUDGMENT.
